h46050392g07a3g4441gab3fgcc147fc9fdc0: ... to keep calm - I'll be there in no... oh hello there!
hfdb7d0a7ge66cg4a03g987eg36e902be8004: A fine day for it, yes?
h09e1a8e9gec9eg4d36gbb0bg7341b5209029: Hold on. Who were you talking to?
h7b8029c7g260fg456dgb024g1b1e73531878: What? Oh, goodness - no one, really. Just a bit of poetry to clear the head.
h320fc820g5277g4bd5g8af8g9ed5edab8ffc: Perhaps it's working. I haven't sprouted a single tentacle - that I can see, anyway. I'd call that a good sign.
h5b77a762g6614g471cgb77egaa47f54ccc4d: I think the parasite might be getting to you.
hd613d5a5gb5f8g4c0eg973cg541d07439645: Did you think... oh goodness, no. Just a bit of poetry to clear the head.
h38960063ga0ddg43e9gb26fg19eb83b6d154: A fine day indeed. Are you starting to turn?
h38fabd75ga1b0g4471gad9ag1054bb136216: Well, I've not sprouted any tentacles - that I can see, anyway. I'd call it a good sign.
hb49abcd5gdfa4g4685gb793gd68846c88325: I agree. Perhaps we've nothing to fear.
h982527ccg3b31g4e6cg87a5g86260dd2e0dd: But do let me know if you start growing a second tongue or something.
h2592a1deg5379g45f1g8282g6e96492a392d: We can't take any chances. We must find a healer - and soon.
h42506cebgcfdcg4345g8d60g6ff6c7ee4cd6: Calm your cockles. We've got a plan, and we're sticking to it.
h13698effg9e88g408bg9719gd2f2e7c0a1af: We can't take any chances. We must be purified - and soon.
heba43083g588bg42aeg8195g949fc6533e2e: Something's not right. I'm keeping an eye on you.
h648a2d30g2cc2g46adg866eg55d71aeb8316: A close eye, I hope - the Blade puts on a good show.
heb04576bga66fg4481g8b60gbb47c7868ce6: And do let me know if I start growing a second tongue or something.
h132809afgca0eg4fe5g8b2agd240c801d6fb: You were talking to someone. I know your eye is a sending stone.
h69f2d1f0ga9e3g42bdg9c2fgd1dcc64dd32c: I told you. A mere chunk of rock.
h8147dd77g5421g48f2ga248gb9752aaabbc6: I'd suggest getting some rest before that brain-bug plants more stories in your head.
